Question: Who initiates the vendor registration — does the vendor self-register, or is a vendor account created by an internal admin? If self-registration: is there an approval/verification step before the vendor can access the portal?
What authentication method is required — username/password, SSO, OAuth, OTP/MFA? Is MFA mandatory or optional?
What are the password complexity rules (min length, special chars, expiry)? How many failed login attempts trigger account lockout? Is there a self-service password reset flow?
What is the session timeout period? Should concurrent sessions be allowed or restricted (one session per user at a time)?
What mandatory and optional fields are required during registration (e.g. GSTIN, PAN, bank account, contact info)? Is document verification required at signup?
What are the possible vendor account states (Pending, Active, Suspended, Deactivated)? Who can change state and what triggers each transition?
What file formats are accepted for invoice uploads — PDF only, or also Excel, CSV, images, ZIP? Will scanned (non-machine-readable) PDFs be accepted?
What is the maximum single file size? Is there a maximum number of files per invoice submission? Is there a total payload size limit per session?
Must a valid PO number exist in the system before the invoice can be submitted? Can a vendor submit against a PO belonging to another vendor?
Is the invoice amount validated against the PO line item value? What tolerance is permitted (0%, ±5%)? What happens if the invoiced amount exceeds the PO value?
How is a duplicate invoice detected — by invoice number, file hash, or vendor+amount+PO? What happens if a duplicate is submitted — silently reject, warn, or allow with flag?
What are all possible invoice statuses (Draft, Submitted, Under Review, Approved, Rejected, Paid, Cancelled)? Can a vendor save a draft before submission?
Can a vendor edit an invoice after submission but before AP review? Can they withdraw an invoice? Under what conditions? Who is notified?
What fields are mandatory on the invoice (invoice number, date, line items, tax breakdown, bank details)? Is GST/VAT breakdown mandatory?
Is partial billing against a PO supported? If so, does the system track cumulative billed amount against PO ceiling?
What sub-roles exist within the AP team (AP Reviewer vs AP Approver vs AP Manager)? Is there a multi-level approval hierarchy for high-value invoices?
Is there a defined SLA for invoice review (e.g. 5 business days)? Does the system send reminder alerts when SLA is approaching or breached?
Is a mandatory reason required when rejecting an invoice? Is there a predefined list or free text? Does the vendor receive the rejection reason?
Can the AP team partially approve an invoice (approve some line items, reject others)? What happens to the partially approved portion?
What happens if two AP reviewers attempt to action the same invoice simultaneously? Is there a locking mechanism to prevent race conditions?
Must all approval/rejection actions be logged with timestamp, user ID, and comments for audit compliance? Is this log immutable?
Which payment or ERP system does the approved invoice integrate with (SAP, Oracle, NetSuite, custom)? Is this via API, SFTP, or manual export?
If the downstream payment system is unavailable, what happens — queue and retry, alert and hold, or fail? Who is notified of a failed forwarding attempt?
Are payment terms (Net 30, Net 60) captured and enforced? Does the system trigger payment on due date automatically or require manual initiation?
Does the payment system send back a confirmation once payment is made? Is this confirmation surfaced to the vendor on the portal?
Are multi-currency invoices supported? If yes, how is the exchange rate determined and at what point (submission, approval, or payment date)?
What specific events trigger notifications — submission received, AP review started, approved, rejected, payment initiated, payment completed? Provide the complete list.
For each event, who receives the email — primary vendor contact only, all contacts, the specific AP reviewer, AP team manager?
Are branded email templates required? Should emails include invoice details (amount, PO number, invoice number) or just a portal link?
Can vendors opt out of certain notification types? Is there an in-portal notification bell in addition to email?
What is the behaviour if an email delivery fails (bounced / invalid email)? Is there a retry mechanism and admin alerting?
Who can access monthly reports — AP Manager, Finance team, all AP users, vendors (their own data only)? Can vendors download their own invoice history?
What metrics must the report include — invoices submitted/approved/rejected/paid, total value, aging analysis, SLA compliance rate, vendor-wise breakdown?
What format should the report be delivered in — PDF, Excel, CSV, or in-portal dashboard? Is it auto-emailed monthly or manually generated on demand?
Is the "monthly" report based on invoice submission date, approval date, or payment date? Can ad-hoc custom date range reports also be generated?
How long must invoice records and reports be retained? Are there regulatory compliance requirements (e.g. 7 years for GST audit trail)?
What user roles exist and what are the precise permissions for each? Proposed: Super Admin, AP Manager, AP Reviewer, Vendor Admin, Vendor User — confirm or revise.
Can a vendor user see other vendors invoices? Can an AP reviewer access invoices outside their assigned queue? Is row-level security required in reports?
Who creates AP team user accounts? What happens to invoices assigned to an AP user who leaves the organization?
Must every login, failed login, page access, and data export be logged for security auditing? How long are access logs retained?
What is the expected concurrent user volume (vendors + AP team)? What is the acceptable page load SLA (e.g. ≤2 seconds at 500 concurrent users)?
Which browsers and versions must be supported? Must the portal be mobile-responsive? Is a native mobile app required now or in future?
Is WCAG 2.1 AA compliance required? Are there any screen-reader or keyboard-navigation requirements?
What is the Recovery Time Objective (RTO) and Recovery Point Objective (RPO)? How frequently are database backups taken?
What security standards must the system comply with (ISO 27001, SOC 2, OWASP Top 10)? Is a formal penetration test required before go-live?
What is the anticipated invoice volume growth rate year-over-year? How many vendors are expected at launch vs end of year 1?
Is multi-language support required? Is the portal only for India (INR, GST) or multi-country?
